title: Department of the Interior, Environment, and Related Agencies Appropriations Act, 2027
action: Placed on the Union Calendar, Calendar No. 599.

action: Placed on the Union Calendar, Calendar No. 598.

action: Placed on the Union Calendar, Calendar No. 398.

action: Referred to the Subcommittee on Water Resources and Environment.

title: Fraud Prevention and Accountability Act
action: Placed on the Union Calendar, Calendar No. 596.

title: Homeland Security and Further Additional Continuing Appropriations Act, 2026.
action: Became Public Law No: 119-86.

title: Endangered Salmon Predation Prevention Act
action: Became Public Law No: 115-329.

title: Endangered Salmon and Fisheries Predation Prevention Act
action: Received in the Senate and Read twice and referred to the Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation.

title: Expressing support for the designation of May 2025 as "Renewable Fuels Month" to recognize the important role that renewable fuels play in reducing carbon impacts, lowering fuel prices for consumers, supporting rural communities, and lessening reliance on foreign adversaries.
action: Pursuant to the provisions of H. Res. 1014, H. Res. 375 is considered passed House as amended.

title: Predation Reduction of Salmon Act
action: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation.

title: Pinniped Predator Deterrence Act
action: Referred to the Subcommittee on Water Resources and Environment.

title: To amend the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 to allow a credit against income tax for qualified conservation contributions which include National Scenic Trails.
action: Referred to the Committee on Ways and Means, and in addition to the Committee on Natural Resources, for a period to be subsequently determined by the Speaker, in each case for consideration of such provisions as fall within the jurisdiction of the committee concerned.

title: To require the Secretary of Defense and the Secretary of Homeland Security to improve the transition of medics into the civilian workforce in certain health care occupations and to modify the assistance provided to separated members of the Armed Forces seeking employment with health care providers, and for other purposes.
action: Referred to the House Committee on Armed Services.

title: To reform the H-1B process, and for other purposes.
action: Referred to the House Committee on the Judiciary.

title: VETRA Act
action: Referred to the House Committee on Veterans' Affairs.

title: To designate Tiananmen Square Memorial Boulevard in Washington, District of Columbia, and for other purposes.
action: Referred to the House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform.

title: To amend the Small Business Act to establish a program under which the Small Business Administration may make supplemental disaster loans to home owner associations to repair common areas damaged by disasters and implement disaster mitigation measures, and for other purposes.
action: Referred to the House Committee on Small Business.

title: To amend title XIX of the Social Security Act to clarify the intent of Congress with regards to Medicaid financing policies.
action: Referred to the House Committee on Energy and Commerce.

title: To increase penalties for the sexual exploitation of children.
action: Referred to the House Committee on the Judiciary.

title: To amend the Richard B. Russell National School Lunch Act to require the Secretary of Agriculture to make grants to eligible entities to acquire and install milk storage-related equipment for use in elementary schools and secondary schools, and for other purposes.
action: Referred to the House Committee on Education and Workforce.
